description: Janndeeji limtooji defte binndaaɗe ko adii gartol Almasiihu — diga Tawreeta e Annabo'en haa Binndi. Alkawal Kesal ɗon holla habaru alkawal Allah bee Isra’iila nden ɗon holla Almasiihu.

sections.description: Defte jowi arandeeji nder Bibel (Pentateuch), ɗon limta tagdi, doggol, wurtugo, e hokkugo Tawreeta — limngal ko heddii nder Binndi.

subsections.name: Fuɗɗoode
subsections.description: Deftere fuɗɗoode: tagoore, doggol, e taaniraaɓe — Ibraahiima, Isiyaaku, Yaakubu e Yuusuf.

subsections.name: Kuugal
subsections.description: Alla hisni leñol mum e maccungaagu to leydi Misra, holliri innde mum, rokki ɗum sariya mum to Sinayi.

subsections.name: Lewitik
subsections.description: Jamirooje dewal e senaare, kollirooje no leñol bakkaat waawirta ɓadtaade Alla ceniiiɗo.

subsections.name: Limɗe
subsections.description: Jahdu Isra’iila nder ladde — 6amtaare maako, neɗɗaaku maako, e jokkugo gooŋgaaku Allah.

subsections.name: Dewtere Dewtere
subsections.description: Waajuuji Muusaa, kesɗitingol alkawal e hesɗitinde Isra’iila’en ngam nastugo lesdi fodaandi.

sections.description: Defte taariiha ɗon tokka habaru Isra'iila diga jaalorgal Kanaana haa laamu, eggugo, e wartugo — ɗon holla gooŋgaaku Allah e gooŋgaaku yimɓe maako ɗon ƴama gooŋgaaku.

subsections.name: Yosuwa
subsections.description: Jaɓɓugol e feccugol leydi fodoore e gardagol Yosuwa.

subsections.name: Ñaawooɓe
subsections.description: Taarde murto, tooñannge, e hisnude nde Isra’iila’en ruttitii e Alla laabi keewɗi.

subsections.name: Ruut
subsections.description: Daartol gooŋɗinal, ballal, e rimɗude waɗaama e jamaanu ñaawooɓe.

subsections.name: 1 Samuyila
subsections.description: Jaltugol e ñaawooɓe haa e laamɓe: Samuyila, Sawulu, e ummital Daawuuda.

subsections.name: 2 Samuyila
subsections.description: Laamu Daawuuda — nasaraaku maako, baasal maako, e alkawal Allah bee saare maako.

subsections.name: 1 Laamɓe
subsections.description: Teddeendi Suleymaani e peccitagol laamu nguu; Eliya e pottital dow tulde Karmel.

subsections.name: 2 Laamɓe
subsections.description: Ustaare e doggol laamlaamuuji ɗiɗi ɗii fof, haa joofni e eggol.

subsections.name: 1 Taariiha
subsections.description: Taariiha Isra'iila diga Aadama haa Daawuda, ɗon yewta dow dewal e suudu dewal.

subsections.name: 2 Taariiha
subsections.description: Suleymaanu e suudu dewal, laamu fecciingu, e yaakaare moƴƴitingol.

subsections.name: Esra
subsections.description: Gartugo diga lesdi e nyiɓugo suudu dewal les ardungal Esra.

subsections.name: Nehemiya
subsections.description: Mahdi mahol Urusaliima e kesɗitinki ummaatoore alkawal.

subsections.name: Ester
subsections.description: Providence Alla suuɗiiɗo ina reena leñol mum e nder suudu Perse.

sections.description: Ayyuuba, Jabuura, Tindi, Waajuuji, e Jimol — defte limtooje luggiɗnde nder taariiha ɓii aadama: torra, yettoode, hikma, e yidde.

subsections.name: Kugal
subsections.description: Yiylo luggiɗngo e torra, nuunɗal, e sirlu laabi Alla.

subsections.name: Jabuura
subsections.description: Deftere jimɗi Isra’iila e deftere du’aawu — timmuɗum nder ɓernde aadee waddaama yeeso Allah.

subsections.name: Tinndi
subsections.description: Hakkille kuuɓtodinɗo ngam nguurndam ñalnde kala, gonɗo e kulol Joomiraaɗo.

subsections.name: Waajoowo
subsections.description: Ƴeewndo njiylawu maanaa, golle, e maayde ‘les naange’.

subsections.name: Jimol Jimol
subsections.description: Mawningol giɗli e dewgal, alɗungol natal weltaare e yiɗde.

sections.description: Defte annabaaku ɗon nodda Isra'iila'en ngam tuubugo, ɗon jeertina dow kiita, ɗon holla yeeso dow rimɗinki Allah haa timmi. Ɗe ngoni ko e faamde no Alkawal Kesal timminirta ɗeen fodoore.

subsections.name: Esaaya
subsections.description: Ñaawoore e yaakaare ɓuuɓnde — ina jeyaa heen Jime Maccuɗo kollitooje Almasiihu.

subsections.name: Yeremiya
subsections.description: Mette annabiijo nde Urusaliima yani, e fodoore alkawal kesal.

subsections.name: Wullaango
subsections.description: Sunaare mawnde dow halkere Urusaliima, jogaande bee tammunde dow nuɗɗinki Allah.

subsections.name: Ezekiyel
subsections.description: Yi’annde tedduŋgal Alla ina yaha ina warta, e fodoore hesɗitinde ruuhu.

subsections.name: Daniyel
subsections.description: Heɓde gooŋɗinal e nder eggol, e gite laamu Alla jom doole dow leƴƴi ɗii fof.

subsections.name: Hoseya
subsections.description: Giɗli Alla ɗi ŋakkataa e leñol ngol hoolaaki, ngol hollirta ko e dewgal Hoseya e hoore mum.

subsections.name: Yowel
subsections.description: Ñawu mboros hono noddaango tuubugol, e fodoore Ruuhu.

subsections.name: Amos
subsections.description: Noddaango annabaagal tiiɗngo ngam nuunɗal e jeertinaango wonde diine meho daraaki.

subsections.name: Obadiya
subsections.description: Haala seeɗa dow Edom e nyalnde Joomiraawo nde warata.

subsections.name: Yunus
subsections.description: Yurmeende Alla e leƴƴi — e annabi 6urcfo 6amtaade cfum.

subsections.name: Mika
subsections.description: Aadi, yurmeende, e neɗɗaaku — e fodoore laamɗo ummoriiɗo Baytilaama.

subsections.name: Nahum
subsections.description: Doggol Niniwe e cuusal peewal Alla wonande leñol mum tooñaaɗo.

subsections.name: Habakuk
subsections.description: Haɓde e Alla e nuunɗal e dow tooñannge, e janngude hoolaade e sahaa mum.

subsections.name: Sefaniya
subsections.description: Ñalnde Joomiraawo e weltaare wartirki ngam heddiiɓe laaɓɓe.

subsections.name: Haggay
subsections.description: Noddaango ngam nyiɓugo suudu dewal e ardugo suudu Allah dow welwelo hoore.

subsections.name: Zakariya
subsections.description: Yi’annde wartirki e Almasiihu garoowo bee neɗɗaaku dow puccu.

subsections.name: Malaki
subsections.description: Noddaango sakkitiingo e gooŋɗinal hade silsil juutɗo yeeso Yuhanna lootoowo.

description: Jannde nder defte binndaaɗe ɓaawo gartol Almasiihu — Linjiila, ɓataakeeji nulaaɓe, e Wahyu. Alkawal Kesal holli timmingo alkawal Allah nder Yeesu e ngeedam ekklessiya arandeewal.

sections.description: Haalaaji nayi dow ngeedam Yeesu, maayde maako, e ummitineeki maako, e habaru yaajnugo ekklessiya arandeere nder duuniyaaru Roma'en fuu.

subsections.name: Matiyo
subsections.description: Yeesu bana timminorde Alkawal Kiiɗɗo, Muusaa keso, e Laamiiɗo laamu Allah.

subsections.name: Mark
subsections.description: Haala jaawka dow Yeesu bana Maccuɗo e Ɓii Allah mo torra.

subsections.name: Luuka
subsections.description: Yeesu bana Dandoowo duniyaaru — bee hakkiilo maako dow miskinɓe, rewɓe, e yimɓe yaasi.

subsections.name: Yuhanna
subsections.description: Natal diinaaji ɓurngal luggiɗde e Iisaa — Konngol ngol waɗi ɓanndu, ko miin woni, Ɓii Alla.

subsections.name: Kuuɗe Nelaaɓe
subsections.description: Ruuhu Ceniiɗo hokkata bawɗe ekklessiya ngam hoosugo linjiila diga Urusaliima haa keerol duniyaaru.

sections.description: Ɓataakeeji Pol haa ekklessiyaaji e yimɓe — limtugo logic linjiila, gikkuuji Masiihiŋko’en, e sifa ekklessiya.

subsections.name: Roomnaaɓe
subsections.description: Facciro Pol ɓurngo laaɓtude e Linjiila: bakkaat, gooŋɗinal, senngo, e yaakaare.

subsections.name: 1 Korintu'en
subsections.description: Hawrude e cereeli e jiiɓru nder Korintu, bee janngirde dow yidde, dokke, e ummitineeki.

subsections.name: 2 Korintiyankooɓe
subsections.description: Faandaare Pol dow kuugal maako e paradox semmbe bee tampere.

subsections.name: Galaatiya'en
subsections.description: Defaare cemmbiɗnde ngam gooŋɗinal e goonɗinal tan e dow ɓeydooɓe sariya.

subsections.name: Efesu'en
subsections.description: Jawdi goonɗinɗo nder Almasiihu, e ekklessiya bana neɗɗaaku kesum Allah.

subsections.name: Filipiyankooɓe
subsections.description: Seyo nder kala haala e yeru neɗɗaaku Almasiihu.

subsections.name: Koloosinaaɓe
subsections.description: Almasiihu bana mawɗo dow kuuje fuu, e ko ɗum ɗon mari haaje nder ngeedam nyalde fuu.

subsections.name: 1 Tesalonika'en
subsections.description: Hirjinde ngam ekklessiya sukaaɓe, bee janngirde dow wartugo Almasiihu.

subsections.name: 2 Tesalonika'en
subsections.description: Feewnitde luural ko fayti e jamaanu timmuɗo, e noddaango golle gooŋɗinɗe.

subsections.name: 1 Timote
subsections.description: Jamirooje ngam nguurdam ekklessiya, ardungal, e janngirde booɗnde.

subsections.name: 2 Timote
subsections.description: Ɓataake Pol cakkitiiɗum — umroore haa Timote ngam o reena Linjiila o timmina no haandi.

subsections.name: Tiitus
subsections.description: Toɗɗaade ardiiɓe e jannginde ndeen jaŋde moƴƴere ina addana en nguurndam Alla.

subsections.name: Filemon
subsections.description: Eeraango neɗɗo ngam moƴƴitinde e ko Linjiila jogori arde e renndo.

sections.description: Bataakeeji ɗi Yaakubu, Piyeer, Yuhanna, Yahuuda, e woɓɓe feere — ɗon limta nuɗɗinki nder jarribooje, nuɗɗinki gooŋga, janngirde fenaande, e tammunde timmunde nder Wahyu.

subsections.name: Ibraniyankooɓe
subsections.description: Yeesu bana timminorde fuu liman'en, sadaka, e alkawal Alkawal Kesal — ɓurdungal dow kala laawol fuu.

subsections.name: Yaakubu
subsections.description: Goonɗinki kuugal — hikma kuugal ngam wuurdugo bana yimɓe Allah nder duniyaaru.

subsections.name: 1 Piyeer
subsections.description: Yaakaare e nguurndam ceniɗam wonande eggiyankooɓe e nder aduna bonɗo.

subsections.name: 2 Piyeer
subsections.description: Jeertinaango feewde e jannginooɓe fenaande e hoolaare e fodoore Alla.

subsections.name: 1 Yuhanna
subsections.description: Yaakaare kisndam e maandeeji goonɗinal goongawal: yiɗde, ɗooftaare, e goonga.

subsections.name: 2 Yuhanna
subsections.description: Ɓataake seeɗa dow yidde, gooŋga, e jaɓɓaago yedduɓe Almasiihu.

subsections.name: 3 Yuhanna
subsections.description: Yettude jaɓɓagol gooŋɗinngol e jeertinde ardorde yiɗde hoore mum.

subsections.name: Yahuuda
subsections.description: Noddaango tiiɗngo ngam haɓaade goonɗinal e janngingol fenaande ngol naati e nder eklesiya.

subsections.name: Wahyu
subsections.description: Yi’anndeeji dow nasaraaku Allah timmuɗum dow bonanndeeji, kiita bonɓe, e kesɗitingol kuuje fuu.

description: Janndeeji ɗon tiitina dow janngirde Masiihiŋko’en — ko Bibel janngini dow Allah, neɗɗaaku, kisndam, e ko warata yeeso. Teddinde koye men e goongɗinal laaɓngal ko mbaydi nguurndam laaɓɗam.

sections.description: Janndeeji nastirde limtuki janngirde Masiihiŋko’en fuu — Linjiila, janngirde mawnde, e taariihaaji ekklessiya.

subsections.name: Fooyre
subsections.description: Ko ɓuri himmude e mahdi goonɗinal Kerecee’en — ko kala goonɗinɗo foti anndude.

subsections.name: Linjiila oo
subsections.description: Janndeeji ɗon ndarna ɓernde haala Kerecee’en: hakke, neema, e kisndam bee Almasiihu.

subsections.name: Goongɗinal & Konngol
subsections.description: Haalaaji taariihaaji iimanaaku ɗi cifotoo diina Kiristaaku ortodoks nder teemerre.

sections.description: Hol ko woni Alla? Janndeeji njiylotooɗi Trinité, sifaaji Alla, e ko firti anndude mo e hoore mum.

subsections.name: Sifaaaji Alla
subsections.description: Senngo Alla, yidde mum, njiimaandi mum, nuunɗal mum, e sifaaji goɗɗi ɗi Binndi ɗii peeñnini.

subsections.name: Trinité
subsections.description: Alla gooto e nder yimɓe tato — Baaba, Ɓiɗɗo, e Ruuhu Ceniiiɗo — e ko waɗi ɗum ina haani.

subsections.name: Alla Baaba
subsections.description: Alla ko Tagɗo, Laamɗo, e Baaba — e ko firti wonde ɓiɗɗo makko.

sections.description: Jannde dow Bibel bee hoore maako — no ɗum wartiri, ko ɗum wi’ata dow hoore maako, e no ɗum janngirtee no haandi.

subsections.name: Ngomna
subsections.description: Ko waɗi Biibal ina jogii hakke haalde e nder kala fannu nguurndam.

subsections.name: Sembe
subsections.description: No Alla golliri e binndooɓe aadee ngam rokkude en konngol mum.

subsections.name: Kanko
subsections.description: No defte Bibel anndirtee e mooɓtirtee.

subsections.name: Firo
subsections.description: Kuule ngam janngude Biibal ngal e gooŋɗinal e laaɓal.

sections.description: Jannde ko woni neɗɗo — tagaa e natal Alla, ɓanndu, tagaa ngam faandaare.

subsections.name: Tagngo
subsections.description: Alla ko Tagɗo huunde fof — e ko ɗum firti e no njiyruɗen aduna.

subsections.name: Natal Alla
subsections.description: Ko firti waɗeede e mbaadi Alla, e teddungal rokkata kala neɗɗo.

subsections.name: Ko ɓamtaare
subsections.description: Moƴƴere jogaade ɓanndu, e ko Binndi ɗii mbiyata ko fayti e gonndigal ɓanndu.

subsections.name: Ngida
subsections.description: Ko waɗi en ɗoo — noddaango neɗɗo ngam yiɗde Alla, gollanaade woɗɓe, e jogaade tagoore.

sections.description: Janngude dow bakkaat — iwdi mum, sifaa mum, e batte mum bonɗe e dow aadee e aduna.

subsections.name: Sifaa Bakkaat
subsections.description: Ko bakkaat woni tigi — wonaa tan 6eydude kuule, kono ko 6eydude 6amtaare e Alla.

subsections.name: Ko Falnde
subsections.description: Ko waɗi e Fuɗɗoode 3, e no ɗum jogori arde e kala neɗɗo.

subsections.name: Jarribo
subsections.description: No jarribo ngo gollirta, e no goonɗinɓe mbaawirta daraade e ngo.

sections.description: Jannde dow neɗɗaaku Yeesu Almasiihu — Allah timmuɗo e neɗɗo timmuɗo — e ko gartol maako ɗon nufa.

subsections.name: Neɗɗo Almasiihu
subsections.description: Jaŋde tagooje ɗiɗi ɗee — no Iisaa woniri Alla timmuɗo e neɗɗo timmuɗo.

subsections.name: Inkarnaasiyoŋ
subsections.description: Ko waɗi Ɓiɗɗo Alla wonti neɗɗo, e ko neɗɗaagal makko firti e men.

sections.description: Hol no Alla dandirta bakkodinooe? Janndeeji kollitooji yaafuya, gooŋɗinal, jaɓgol, e denndaangal ko Alla waɗata ngam hisnude en.

subsections.name: Yaafuya
subsections.description: No maayde Almasiihu waɗirta hakke — lomtingol, rimɗinki, jokkirgol, e ko nanndi heen.

subsections.name: Waylude
subsections.description: Ko ɗum firti ruttaade e bakkaat e hoolaade Almasiihu — tuubude e goonɗinde.

subsections.name: Goongɗingol
subsections.description: Wonnde gooŋgaajo yeeso Allah — bee neema tan, bee nuɗɗinki tan, bee Almasiihu tan.

subsections.name: Jaɓde
subsections.description: Dokkal keeringal ngal o naatnaa e nder galle Alla hono ɓiɓɓe makko worɓe e rewɓe.

sections.description: Jannde dow Ruuhu Ceniiɗo — moye o woni, ko o waɗata, e no o huuwirta nder nuɗɗinɓe e ekklessiya.

subsections.name: Neɗɗo Ruuhu
subsections.description: Ruuhu Ceniiɗo bana neɗɗo tataɓo nder Trinity — naa semmbe, ammaa neɗɗo.

subsections.name: Ɓiɓɓe Ruuhu
subsections.description: Jikkuuji ɗi Ruuhu oo yaltini e yahduɓe e makko.

subsections.name: Dokke Ruuhu
subsections.description: Dokke ɗe Ruuhu hokkata ngam heɓugo nuɗɗinɓe ngam kuugal nder ɓanndu Almasiihu.

sections.description: Hol ko woni eklesiya, hol ko waɗi ɗum ina waɗi nafoore? Jannde dow sifaa, kuugal, e mbaydi ɓanndu Almasiihu.

subsections.name: Nafoore Eklesiya
subsections.description: Ko Ekklessiya woni — yimɓe Allah, ɓanndu Almasiihu, suudu Ruuhu.

subsections.name: Sakramentuuji
subsections.description: Lootgol e nyaamdu Joomiraawo — ko ɗum woni, ko ɗum firti, e no ɗum rewirtee.

subsections.name: Ardorde
subsections.description: Laabi ardungal ekklessiya nder deftere nde: mawɓe, diinaaji, e laamu ɓernde maccuɗo.

subsections.name: Dewal
subsections.description: Ko woni dewal Kerecee’en, ko waɗi ɗum woodi nafuuda, e no ɗum siforii nguurndam renndo.

sections.description: Jannde dow maayde, ummitineeki, kiita, e tagdi kesiri — yaakaare nde ɗon siftora no Masiihiŋko’en nguurdi haa jooni.

subsections.name: Gartol Almasiihu
subsections.description: Yaakaare laaɓnde wonde Iisaa maa artu e teddungal ngam ñaawde wuurɓe e maayɓe.

subsections.name: Ñaawoore
subsections.description: Kiita Allah timmuɗum dow yimɓe fuu — e habaru belɗum dow Almasiihu hokki kiita ngam yimɓe maako.

subsections.name: Asamaan & Jahannama
subsections.description: Daareeji duumiiɗi ɗi Binndi ɗii cifotoo — e ko waɗi ɗi ina njogii nafoore e no nguurduɗen jooni.

description: Janndeeji jokkindirɗi goonga deftere nde bee anndal nyalɗe fuu dow tokkugo Almasiihu — nder jokkindiral, kuugal, anndal, e hare jokkiinde dow hakke.

sections.description: Golle ɗe njannginta en ngam jokkude ɓadtaade Alla e mawnude e nder dewal — wonaa laabi dañde moƴƴere, kono ko aadaaji ɗi mbaɗata en udditaade e moƴƴere makko.

subsections.name: Duwaawu
subsections.description: Haaldude e Alla — jojjanɗe mum, mbaadiiji mum, e no ƴellitortoo nguurndam duwaawu ɓurɗam alɗude.

subsections.name: Janngugol Biibal
subsections.description: No janngirtee Binndi ɗii no moƴƴi — e faamde, e jokkondire, e ɗaminaade wayleede.

subsections.name: Dewal
subsections.description: Dewal ko darnde nguurndam fof, wonaa tan golle ñalnde alet.

sections.description: Laawol jokkingol ngam ɓurde nanndude e Almasiihu — haɓaade bakkaat, mawnude e moƴƴere, e faamde ko ngonɗen e makko.

subsections.name: Ɓiɓɓe Ruuhu
subsections.description: Yidde, seyo, jam, munyal, moƴƴere, moƴƴere, hoolaare, neɗɗaaku e jogaade hoore.

subsections.name: Jaalɗude Bakkaat
subsections.description: Ballal gollal e diineeji ngam haɓaade paandaale bakkaat duumotooɗe.

subsections.name: Mawnugol e nder Moƴƴere
subsections.description: Ko nanndi e mawnugo bana Kerecee’en — e ko nastata nder laawol.

subsections.name: Anndinde e nder Almasiihu
subsections.description: Mo en ngoni ngam ko Almasiihu waɗi — e ko waɗi ɗum wayli huunde fuu.

sections.description: Jannde dow jokkindiral ngal Allah wadi en nder — dewgal, saare, soobiraaku, e rento.

subsections.name: Teegal
subsections.description: Alkawal dewgal — faandaare maako, caɗeele maako, e natal maako dow Almasiihu e Ekklessiya.

subsections.name: Cehilaagal
subsections.description: Cehilaagal ko noddaango timmungo, laaɓtungo, wonaa suudu fadndo ngam dewgal.

subsections.name: Jibinannde
subsections.description: Mawnugo ɓikkoy nder nuɗɗinki — bee neema, gooŋga, e gite juutɗe.

subsections.name: Sobajo
subsections.description: Dokkal sehilaagal Kerecee’en — e no rimɗinirta jokkondiral ngal yahrata haa luggiɗi.

subsections.name: Ngewte
subsections.description: Haalde goonga e moƴƴere — e heɗaade no moƴƴi.

subsections.name: Ummatore
subsections.description: Ko ɗum firti wuurdugo bana ɓanndu Almasiihu — jokkitondira bee teddeendi.

sections.description: Jannde huuwtinirgo linjiila dow kuugal, ceede, wakkati, e yidde — yi’ugo kuugal nyalde fuu bana nder anniyaaji Allah.

subsections.name: Nguurndam Golle
subsections.description: Ko Bibel wi’i dow kuugal — booɗɗum maajum, ɓilla maajum, e soodugo maajum nder Almasiihu.

subsections.name: Kaalis & Jawdi
subsections.description: Yaakaare, weltaare, e yi’annde deftere dow jawdi.

subsections.name: Njuɓɓudi Waktu
subsections.description: No en kuutortoo wakkati men — e no linjiila waylirta ko ɓuri himmude e men.

subsections.name: Ngiɗa
subsections.description: Ambition ceniinde vs. ambition selfish — e no anndirta feere.

subsections.name: Retireede
subsections.description: Hol no nguurndam gooŋɗinɗam wayi e yontaaji garooji nguurndam.

sections.description: No gooŋɗinɓe miijotoo e no mbaɗirta e naamne jowitiiɗe e koɗki jamaanu men hannde oo — gila e nuunɗal renndo haa e bioethics haa e karallaagal.

subsections.name: Njuɓɓudi Renndo
subsections.description: Ɓernde Alla wonande waasɓe e tooñooɓe, e ko ɗum firti e men.

subsections.name: Biyoetik
subsections.description: Fuɗɗoode e joofnirde geɗe nguurndam — ɓadtiima e toppitagol diine e yurmeende.

subsections.name: Karallaagal jokkondirngal
subsections.description: No kuutorto-ɗen karallaagal e nuunɗal e nder aduna mo ngal mbayli.

sections.description: Janndeeji ballooji nuɗɗinɓe yahdugo nder nawnaare, nder tammunde, e caɗeele bee gooŋgaaku e tammunde.

subsections.name: Jarribooji e Caɗeele
subsections.description: Ko waɗi Alla ina jaɓa torra, e no Binndi ɗii ndokkirta en muñde ɗi e yaakaare.

subsections.name: Faamde Yiɗde Alla
subsections.description: No mbaɗata kuule hakkilantaagal — e ko Binndi ɗii fodani tigi rigi ko fayti e ardungal.

subsections.name: Cellal hakkille
subsections.description: Depression, anxiety, e hareeji goɗɗi — ɓadtiima e yurmeende e toppitagol deftere.

subsections.name: Haraka
subsections.description: No mettinirten no ɓeen jogiiɓe yaakaare — e nuunɗal, tawa wonaa gooto.

description: Jannde ngam ɓeen wonɓe e gollanaade woɗɓe — e nder linjiila, e reentaade, e jannginde, e ardaade. Ɗi’i janndeeji ɗi ɗon ndarna nder Binndi, ɗon hokka nuɗɗinɓe kuugal booɗngal e duumotoongal.

sections.description: Fuɗɗoode deftere ngam kuugal Masiihiŋko’en fuu — ko woni kuugal, e no maccuɗo foti laata.

subsections.name: Ardorde Maccuɗo
subsections.description: Ardugo bana Yeesu ardi — bee neɗɗaaku, sadaka, e hakkiilo ngam ɓe kuuwata.

subsections.name: Noddude
subsections.description: Famde noddaango maaɗa e kuugal — no ɗum anndirtee e ko ɗum hawrata.

sections.description: Jannde ngam ɓe noddaama ngam fammingo Bibel haa yeeso yimɓe — ɗon limta laawol, gikku, e teddungal jogaago wolde Allah.

subsections.name: Waaju firo
subsections.description: No waajata bee gooŋgaaku diga binndi — accugo Bibel ɗon waɗa agenda.

subsections.name: Ardude Janngirɗe Bibel
subsections.description: No ardirta fedde no haandi — ƴamugo ƴamɗe booɗɗe e wallugo yimɓe hawta bee Allah nder binndi.

sections.description: Dimensiyonji kuugal e diina ngam ardungal ekklessiya malla kuugal — yi’annde, ekipaaji, fitinaaji, e laamu.

subsections.name: Yiyngo & Feere
subsections.description: No miijotoɗen laaɓndal hol to Alla ardi e no njogorii yahrude toon.

subsections.name: Mahngo Kippu
subsections.description: Moftude, ƴellitde, e jogaade ekipaaji gollorɗi celluɗi.

subsections.name: Ƴellitaare luural
subsections.description: No luural e feccere njuɓɓinirtee e no teddinirta Alla e reende ngootaagu.

subsections.name: Laamu Eklesiya
subsections.description: Njuɓɓudi e laabi ballooji eklesiya ngam heɓde limto e yuɓɓo moƴƴo.

sections.description: Janndeeji ballitooji goonɗinɓe ngam yahdugo bee maɓɓe nder caɗeele, majjugo, ɓillaaji, e haaje.

subsections.name: Jeewte Pastoral
subsections.description: Karallaagal e darnde haani ngam yewtereeji kuugal ballooji gooto-gooto.

subsections.name: Naatgol e Kiriis
subsections.description: No jaabotoo e hakkille e yurmeende so neɗɗo ina wondi e caɗeele teeŋtuɗe.

subsections.name: Njillu
subsections.description: Jaagorgal gonngal — yi’ugo nyawɓe, mawɓe, e ɓe ɗon nder saare.

subsections.name: Dewgal Prep
subsections.description: Wallude jommbaajo debbo ngam taskaago dewgal mahi dow Almasiihu.

subsections.name: Toppitagol Maayɓe
subsections.description: Yahdude e mettuɓe — ko haaldata, ko haaldataa, e no heddotoo.

sections.description: Jannde dow hoosugo linjiila haa ɓe nanaay ɗum — bee hoore maako, haa nokkuure maako, e nder finaa-tawaa.

subsections.name: Seedaade neɗɗo
subsections.description: No ndokkirtaa gooŋɗinal maa e nafoore e laaɓal e nder jeewte ñalnde kala.

subsections.name: Yaafuya
subsections.description: Jaabtaade naamne ɗe haɗata yimɓe ƴettude diine kerecee en no haanirta nii.

subsections.name: Ministeer hakkunde pine
subsections.description: Gollaade e renndinde e nder keeri pinal e nder njurum e teddungal.

subsections.name: Lelnugol Eklesiya
subsections.description: Tiyoloji e gollal ngam sosde renndooji kesi linjiila.

sections.description: Jannde dow ministeer wallugo woɓɓe mawna — gooto e gooto, nder pelle pamare, e bee janngingo yontaaji garooji.

subsections.name: Ministeer gooto-e-gooto
subsections.description: Doole anniyaaji, almudɓe hoore mum — kawral wakkati fuu ngam udditugo Bibel bee kawtal.

subsections.name: Ardiiɗo Fedde tokosere
subsections.description: No ardirta fedde tokosere nde goonga, nde mawni, nde tuugnii e Binndi.

subsections.name: Jannginde Woɗɓe
subsections.description: Hokkugo woɓɓe ngam waɗugo kuugal ministaajo — ɗuuɗal naa tan tuubɓe ammaa ardiiɓe.

description: Janngirɗe ɗe njiidaani no moƴƴi e cate goɗɗe — walla ɗe humpitooji mum en ndartinaaka tawo.
